$comment: measured (not budgeted) gzip sizes, rendered by the README size badges and stamped into the lyra-ui.com hero; each component is bundled standalone, so lit and the shared base are counted once in every per-component figure and barrelGzipKb is what importing everything costs. Regenerated by scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs --write-budgets; the normal check fails when the live build drifts from these.
